hooks.command: root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -f "$root/.claude-commit" ]; then exit 0; fi; case "$branch" in ai/*) exit 0;; *) echo "Blocked: git commit on '$branch' (autonomous mode requires an ai/* branch or .claude-commit sentinel at the repo root). Produce the message and let the user run the commit." >&2; exit 2;; esac
echo 'Blocked: git push reserved for the user; remote state is not Claude-managed.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git rebase reserved for the user. The user does the review-and-rebase pass on AI commits.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git merge reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git reset --hard discards working state. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git clean -f discards untracked files. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git branch -D force-deletes branches. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git branch -d deletes branches. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git branch --delete reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git stash drop loses stashed work. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git stash clear loses all stashed work. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git tag -d reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git tag --delete reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git filter-branch rewrites history. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git filter-repo rewrites history. Reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'Blocked: git update-ref reserved for the user.' >&2; exit 2

$j=[Console]::In.ReadToEnd()|ConvertFrom-Json; $cmd=$j.tool_input.command; $blocked=@('\bgit\s+push\b','\bgit\s+rebase\b','\bgit\s+merge\b','\bgit\s+reset\s+--hard\b','\bgit\s+clean\s+-[a-zA-Z]*f','\bgit\s+branch\s+(-D|-d|--delete)\b','\bgit\s+stash\s+(drop|clear)\b','\bgit\s+tag\s+(-d|--delete)\b','\bgit\s+filter-branch\b','\bgit\s+filter-repo\b','\bgit\s+update-ref\b'); foreach($p in $blocked){ if($cmd -match $p){ [Console]::Error.WriteLine('Blocked: mutative git operation reserved for the user.'); exit 2 } }; if($cmd -match '(?i)\bgit\s+commit\b'){ $root=(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); $branch=(git branch --show-current 2>$null); if((Test-Path "$root/.claude-commit") -or ($branch -match '^ai/')){exit 0}; [Console]::Error.WriteLine("Blocked: git commit on '$branch' (requires ai/* branch or .claude-commit sentinel)."); exit 2 }
